message:
feat(core): add prebound-publication reload and apply rustfmt (bd-db300.4.5.2)

Add reload_memdb_from_pager_with_prebound_publication() which reuses
an already-bound BoundPagerPublication to avoid a redundant
bind_pager_publication call on the hot path. Two call sites in
refresh_memdb_if_stale and the FullReloadRequired match arm now pass
through the pre-existing publication instead of re-binding.

Apply rustfmt to test code in connection.rs (~6 hunks of line
wrapping and trailing comma placement) and raptorq_integration.rs
(3 arithmetic expressions in tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
